research.title: From Operating Model to Product: How We Built the ROC for Detection-Speed Remediation
research.summary: In the first article in this series, we made the case for a prevention-led operating model. This article is about what happened next: the decision to build something that did not exist, and what it took to make it real. Turning an operating model into a.

research.title: ZDI-26-331: (Pwn2Own) Microsoft Edge Feedback Log File Handling Directory Traversal Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

research.title: ZDI-26-328: ASUS Business Manager Service Client-Side Authentication Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
research.summary: This vulnerability allows local attackers to escalate privileges on affected installations of ASUS Business Manager. An attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability. The ZDI.

vulns.title: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows attackers to bypass security restrictions and establish an unauthorized VPN connection.

python3 <script>.py --target https://<authorized-target>

credential access from service context

internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered

vulns.title: PoC of CVE-2026-49943
vulns.summary: CZ.NIC BIRD Internet Routing Daemon through 2.19.0 contains a stack-based buffer overflow in the BGP AS_PATH mask matching implementation in nest/a-path.c. The as_path_match() function uses a fixed-size stack array of 2048 + 1.
vulns.technicalSummary: CZ.NIC BIRD Internet Routing Daemon through 2.19.0 contains a stack-based buffer overflow in the BGP AS_PATH mask matching implementation in nest/a-path.c. The as_path_match() function uses a fixed-size stack array of 2048 + 1.
vulns.breakdown: CZ.NIC BIRD Internet Routing Daemon through 2.19.0 contains a stack-based buffer overflow in the BGP AS_PATH mask matching implementation in nest/a-path.c. The as_path_match() function uses a fixed-size stack array of 2048 + 1.
vulns.whatBroke: CZ.NIC BIRD Internet Routing Daemon through 2.19.0 contains a stack-based buffer overflow in the BGP AS_PATH mask matching implementation in nest/a-path.c. The as_path_match() function uses a fixed-size stack array of 2048 + 1.
